name: Fluted Glass Bathroom Soap Pump Light Green - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Decorate your bathroom sink area with this Fluted Glass Bathroom Soap Pump from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This fluted container features a see-through design in light green with a brass-hue pump for an elegant aesthetic. Made of glass and plastic, it boasts a 9.4-ounce capacity and can be filled and refilled with gel soaps and lotions.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
